# NeuralMimicry Marketing — Wiki Home — Wiki Home

Brand assets, messaging frameworks, media plans, and video-production resources for the NeuralMimicry project. This repository is the working home for all marketing materials grounded in the live NeuralMimicry product suite.

> ☕ [Support NeuralMimicry on Crowdfunder](https://www.crowdfunder.co.uk/p/qr/aWggxwPW?utm_campaign=sharemodal&utm_medium=referral&utm_source=shortlink)

## Contents

- Brand assets and style guide
- Reusable messaging by product and solution route
- Media planning templates
- Video production resources and transcripts



## Commercial website

The public-facing commercial site is at [neuralmimicry.ai](https://neuralmimicry.ai). The site source is maintained separately.
